feature.name: Notes Migration Requirements
feature.description: Create comprehensive requirements documentation for migrating Notes feature from FileMaker to Supabase, including data model design, API contracts, and migration planning

standing_constraints: DO NOT modify backend infrastructure - only create documentation
DO NOT create Supabase tables or migrations - document requirements only
Follow BACKEND_CHANGE_REQUEST protocol - this is requirements documentation for backend team
Use standardized documentation template structure across all requirement files
Include code references with file paths and line numbers where applicable
Preserve all existing FileMaker functionality in requirements - no features should be lost

tasks.title: Create requirements/notes directory structure
tasks.description: Create the requirements/notes/ directory and placeholder files for all documentation templates: README.md, current-implementation.md, data-model-mapping.md, api-contracts.md, authorization.md, migration-plan.md, acceptance-criteria.md
tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented a new documentation scaffold under 'requirements/notes' by creating the directory and adding placeholder templates for migration planning and requirements capture. Key files added include 'requirements/notes/README.md', 'current-implementation.md', 'data-model-mapping.md', 'api-contracts.md', 'authorization.md', 'migration-plan.md', and 'acceptance-criteria.md'. Templates were standardized with '[TO BE DOCUMENTED]' placeholders, example patterns from the Teams migration, and reminders for code references, while explicitly following the Backend Change Protocol to document requirements without changing backend infrastructure.

tasks.title: Document current notes implementation
tasks.description: Create current-implementation.md documenting: FileMaker devNotes layout usage, existing frontend code (api/notes.js, services/noteService.js, hooks/useNote.js), UI components (ProjectNotesTab, TaskList notes display), current CRUD operations and data flow
tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented comprehensive documentation of the existing notes feature by analyzing the FileMaker layout and the full frontend stack (API, services, hooks, and UI), including detailed end-to-end data flows and current CRUD coverage. Added the writeup to 'requirements/notes/current-implementation.md' (574 lines), referencing key files such as 'src/api/notes.js', 'src/api/projects.js', 'src/api/tasks.js', 'src/services/noteService.js', 'src/hooks/useNote.js', 'src/hooks/useProject.js', 'src/hooks/useTask.js', 'src/components/projects/ProjectNotesTab.jsx', and 'src/components/tasks/TaskList.jsx'. Captured important decisions and findings, notably the inconsistent note data shape between project notes (raw FileMaker fieldData) and task notes (processed content), plus limitations like missing update delete, no pagination, and an unused 'type' field. Verified the project build succeeds and updated task status and timestamps accordingly.

tasks.title: Analyze notes UI behavior and user flows
tasks.description: Document in current-implementation.md: how notes are created (ProjectNotesTab, TaskList), how notes are displayed (reverse chronological order), note data fields shown to users, creation/edit workflows, any validation or business rules
tasks.implementation_notes: Documented the existing notes UI behavior and end-to-end user flows by adding a large new 'UI Behavior and User Flows' section to 'requirements/notes/current-implementation.md', covering creation workflows for project and task notes, display/sorting patterns, validation rules, state management, refresh behavior, error UX, accessibility, modal behavior, and explicitly noting that edit/delete are not implemented. The documentation references the current implementation across key files including 'src/components/projects/ProjectNotesTab.jsx', 'src/components/tasks/TaskList.jsx', 'src/components/global/TextInput.jsx', 'src/hooks/useNote.js', 'src/hooks/useTask.js', 'src/services/noteService.js', and 'src/services/taskService.js', with line-level callouts. Important decisions/findings captured include the project vs task notes data-format inconsistency, differing sorting responsibility (backend vs service layer), and that metadata is intentionally hidden from the UI. The task status and timestamp were updated and the build was verified to compile successfully.

tasks.title: Map FileMaker devNotes schema to Supabase
tasks.description: Create data-model-mapping.md documenting: FileMaker field mapping (_fkID, note, type, __ID, timestamps), Supabase table design with polymorphic associations, recommended schema approach (nullable FKs vs junction tables), column types and constraints, indexes needed for performance
tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented comprehensive FileMaker devNotes to Supabase data model mapping documentation by fully replacing the placeholder template in 'requirements/notes/data-model-mapping.md' with detailed schema, field mappings, migration transformations, constraints, indexes, triggers, and RLS guidance, including references to existing code such as 'src/api/fileMaker.js', 'src/api/notes.js', 'src/api/projects.js', and 'src/api/tasks.js'. Updated 'tasks.json' to mark 'TSK0004' as completed after confirming the build succeeded. Key decisions documented include using a single 'notes' table with nullable parent foreign keys plus a check constraint to enforce exactly one parent, deriving 'organization_id' from the parent entity for multi-tenancy, and applying cascade deletes and partial indexes for performance.

tasks.title: Define backend API contracts for notes
tasks.description: Create api-contracts.md with: REST endpoints or RPC functions for list/create/update/delete operations, request/response schemas, query parameters for filtering by parent entity, error responses, example requests/responses, pagination if needed
tasks.implementation_notes: Created comprehensive backend API contracts documentation in 'requirements/notes/api-contracts.md' (722 lines), defining 5 REST API endpoints (GET /api/notes, GET /api/notes/:id, POST /api/notes, PATCH /api/notes/:id, DELETE /api/notes/:id) with complete request/response schemas, query parameters, validation rules, error handling, and example requests. Documented HMAC-SHA256 authentication requirements, Supabase direct access patterns with RLS policies, realtime subscription patterns, pagination strategy (default 50, max 200), performance targets (< 500ms for list queries), and comprehensive error code catalog (EMPTY_NOTE_CONTENT, NO_PARENT_ENTITY, MULTIPLE_PARENT_ENTITIES, etc.). Included frontend integration patterns referencing 'src/services/dataService.js', 'src/api/notes.js', and 'src/services/supabaseService.js'. Followed Teams migration API contract pattern from 'BACKEND_CHANGE_REQUEST_002_TEAMS_MIGRATION.md'. Key decisions: polymorphic parent entity validation (exactly one of customer_id/project_id/task_id required), organization_id auto-inferred from JWT, offset-based pagination, no application-level caching, hard delete operations.

tasks.title: Design authorization and RLS policies
tasks.description: Create authorization.md documenting: row-level security policies needed, org-scoping requirements, who can create/read/update/delete notes, how permissions inherit from parent entities (project/task access), service role vs anon key usage

tasks.title: Create migration and backfill plan
tasks.description: Create migration-plan.md with: data export process from FileMaker, ID mapping strategy (_fkID to Supabase UUIDs), parent entity type detection, bulk insert approach, validation steps, rollback plan, cutover strategy

tasks.title: Define acceptance criteria and test cases
tasks.description: Create acceptance-criteria.md with: functional test cases for all CRUD operations, association validation tests, edge cases (orphaned notes, concurrent creation), data migration validation, performance requirements, user acceptance criteria

tasks.title: Write requirements README overview
tasks.description: Create README.md as overview document with: feature summary, quick links to all other docs, key decisions and rationale, open questions for backend team, timeline and dependencies, contact/ownership info

tasks.title: Review and validate requirements completeness
tasks.description: Review all documentation for: completeness (all current functionality captured), clarity (backend team can implement from docs alone), consistency across documents, no contradictions, all code references accurate, all FileMaker dependencies identified
